variables.notes: CR:nc|high. Candidate list appears to miss the strongest overhead row, 'Payroll and Related Expenses', which is present in the Income Statement preview and is a clear SG&A-type component. Included it from the full preview, so manual review is required. R&D is also included in XSGA because a separate above-EBIT R&D line exists and selected overhead buckets do not clearly subsume it; this allows XSGA-XRD to exclude R&D. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Payroll and Related Expenses
